message:
test(golden_corpus): add RPC mode parse error recovery and sequential command fixtures

Two new golden corpus fixtures for RPC mode surface coverage:

rpc_parse_error_recovery.json:
- Validates that an invalid JSON line (missing closing brace) produces
  a parse error response with success=false, and the subsequent valid
  get_state command still succeeds — confirming per-line error isolation
  rather than stream-level failure

rpc_sequential_commands.json:
- Validates that multiple commands in a single stdin stream each get
  independent response envelopes: a valid get_state succeeds while an
  unknown command (not_a_real_command) fails with descriptive error,
  both keyed by their respective request IDs

Both fixtures use schema pi.golden_corpus.v1 with --mode rpc,
--no-tools/extensions/skills/themes, and --thinking off for
deterministic baseline behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.golden_corpus.v1",
+  "scenario": "rpc_mode_parse_error_recovery",
+  "surface": "rpc_mode",
+  "description": "RPC mode recovery: invalid JSON line returns parse error and subsequent valid command still succeeds",
+  "cli_args": [
+    "--mode", "rpc",
+    "--provider", "anthropic",
+    "--model", "claude-sonnet-4-5",
+    "--api-key", "test-vcr-key",
+    "--no-tools",
+    "--no-extensions",
+    "--no-skills",
+    "--no-prompt-templates",
+    "--no-themes",
+    "--thinking", "off"
+  ],
+  "stdin": "{\"id\":\"cmd-rpc-4a\",\"type\":\"get_state\"\n{\"id\":\"cmd-rpc-4b\",\"type\":\"get_state\"}\n",
+  "env_overrides": {},
+  "cassette": null,
+  "expected": {
+    "exit_code": 0,
+    "stdout_contains": [
+      "\"command\":\"parse\"",
+      "\"success\":false",
+      "Failed to parse command",
+      "\"id\":\"cmd-rpc-4b\"",
+      "\"command\":\"get_state\"",
+      "\"success\":true"
+    ],
+    "stdout_not_contains": [],
+    "stderr_not_contains": ["panic"]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.golden_corpus.v1",
+  "scenario": "rpc_mode_sequential_commands",
+  "surface": "rpc_mode",
+  "description": "RPC mode script flow: handles multiple commands in one stdin stream with independent response envelopes",
+  "cli_args": [
+    "--mode", "rpc",
+    "--provider", "anthropic",
+    "--model", "claude-sonnet-4-5",
+    "--api-key", "test-vcr-key",
+    "--no-tools",
+    "--no-extensions",
+    "--no-skills",
+    "--no-prompt-templates",
+    "--no-themes",
+    "--thinking", "off"
+  ],
+  "stdin": "{\"id\":\"cmd-rpc-3a\",\"type\":\"get_state\"}\n{\"id\":\"cmd-rpc-3b\",\"type\":\"not_a_real_command\"}\n",
+  "env_overrides": {},
+  "cassette": null,
+  "expected": {
+    "exit_code": 0,
+    "stdout_contains": [
+      "\"id\":\"cmd-rpc-3a\"",
+      "\"command\":\"get_state\"",
+      "\"success\":true",
+      "\"id\":\"cmd-rpc-3b\"",
+      "\"command\":\"not_a_real_command\"",
+      "\"success\":false",
+      "Unknown command: not_a_real_command"
+    ],
+    "stdout_not_contains": [],
+    "stderr_not_contains": ["panic"]
+  }
+}
